imageComparison.summary: The current reference preserves the selected ideal mostly as a large image-backed frame, with only a small editable context header above it. The ideal calls for the full instructor adoption page to be recreated as editable modules: nav, hero, verified instructor card, proof strip, course-planning workbench, teaching resources, and adoption support.

majorDiffAreas.title: Reference is still image-backed instead of editable
majorDiffAreas.expected: The ideal is a dense editable instructor page with separate navigation, hero, proof strip, roadmap selector, timeline, resource cards, and adoption panels.
majorDiffAreas.actual: The mockup shows a small editable header and a single large embedded source reference image, so nearly all visual content is not represented by DOM structure.
majorDiffAreas.impact: The target cannot be used as an editable HTML/CSS reference or later implementation source until the image-backed content is converted into real sections.

evidence.observation: Actual screenshot exposes only five visible text blocks outside the image-backed reference frame.
The main content is a source-frame section containing source-reference.png rather than structured page modules.

majorDiffAreas.recommendedChange: Replace the source-frame image shell with editable HTML/CSS sections that reconstruct the selected instructor path screen using verified local book, roadmap, and university logo assets.

matches: The current shell uses the correct selected generated reference image.
The broad navy, gold, paper, and serif-heading direction aligns with the ideal palette.
The selected source image is present and scaled clearly.
The mockup has an academic paper background and a navy/gold identity block.
uncertainties: The generated ideal includes approximate logos and book details, so the editable mockup should substitute verified local assets rather than copy those pixels.
possibleIntentionalDeviations: Using real local assets may differ slightly from the generated ideal while improving factual fidelity.

nextIteration.focus: Convert the image-backed instructor page into editable DOM modules.
steps: Replace the embedded reference image with structured nav, hero, proof, roadmap, resource, and adoption-support sections.
Use verified local assets for the book cover, four roadmap previews, and university logo strip.
Update region contracts so Limner can inspect the newly editable sections.
avoidForNow: Do not add new generated images or stock imagery.
Do not chase pixel-perfect logo reproduction from the generated ideal.

imageComparison.rationale: The largest fidelity gap is not a small style mismatch; it is that the reference is still an image-backed scaffold. Converting the page body into real HTML/CSS unlocks meaningful future Limner comparisons.

recommendation.topFix: Replace the source-reference image shell with editable instructor-path page modules using verified local assets.
recommendation.why: This is the highest-impact change because the current mockup cannot be meaningfully polished or implemented while most content is just an embedded image.
